description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). Location: New Cairo. Dated: Tuesday, 11 Ḥeshvan 1409 Seleucid = 20 October 1097 CE. Husband: Ṭahor b. Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen. Wife: Banāt bt. Natan. Signed (and written?) by Avraham b. Natan Av ha-Yeshivah and Avraham b. Ḥalfon. Verso is blank. (Information from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: גט גירושין, קהיר החדשה, 20 באוקטובר 1097, בעל: טהור בן ישועה הכהן, אישה: בנאת בת נתן
